prerequisites: An API key generated within your CallRail account. API keys are scoped to the individual user who created them and have access to the same data as that user.
Your CallRail account_id: the nine digit number that follows /a/ in the dashboard URL shown in your browser when viewing CallRail.
A start_date marking the earliest date from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: API key (account_id + api_key)
authMethods.summary: CallRail authenticates every API request with an API key sent in the HTTP header as `Authorization: Token token="YOUR_API_KEY"`. The api_key is paired with your numeric account_id, which is used in the request path (for example /v3/a/{account_id}/calls.json). Treat the API key like a password and keep it private; it inherits the permissions of the user who created it.

setupSteps.title: Create or sign in to a CallRail account
setupSteps.body: You need an active CallRail account before you can generate an API key or make API calls.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Generate an API key from within your CallRail account and supply it as the api_key field. Keys are scoped to the user who created them and grant access to the same data that user can see, so keep the key private.

setupSteps.title: Find your account ID
setupSteps.body: Locate your account_id, the nine digit number that follows /a/ in the URL shown in your browser when viewing the CallRail dashboard. Provide this value as the account_id field.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date to define the earliest point from which CallRail data should be synced.
